column3: Careful. The sea breeze is strong at night.
...I love this place. It's high up, so you can see the waves go far into the distance.
Did you have fun with me these last few days?
Tell me your honest feelings... I want to know the truth.
...How was your job as the supervisor?

# 6日目、Pルート(チオ: # Gルート（チオ生存）だと「楽しかった」しか選べない

column3: You chose little people for me every day. How did that feel?
There's another me inside of me.
Her senses are dulled, and she rarely moves.
Someone good-looking likes her, or a friend's dream comes true...
Other people would cry in happiness at that, but she doesn't respond at all.
So I don't feel happy either. I paste a smile on my face, but it's like I'm not even there.
The girl inside me does respond strongly sometimes. To screams. To tears rolling down cheeks.
To thin arms and legs, huge eyes, and tiny bodies I can do anything I want to...
The first time I shrunk somebody, I finally felt fulfilled.
This is it. I knew the moment I did it.
I knew I shouldn't do it. That I was hurting somebody.
But there's something within me that I can't hold back...
And if I don't hurt someone...make them feel pain...that something will never be fulfilled.
I wish somebody's smile could make me happy, like it does for other people.
That's what it's like for everyone, right?!
But not for me! I can't be happy unless I'm hurting someone!
This is how I was born!
So who cares? I can do what I want!
Hey, Rin. Let me go home.
I want time to think by myself.
Thank you. I knew you'd understand me.
Great. I was a bit worried.

# 6日目、Pルート(チオ: # チオ生存＝リンがクララを差し出した場合

column3: That girl you fed me today--Clara.
I shrunk her and brought her here since she was close to you, Rin.
I thought it'd be a nice little test for you.
...But you passed. I should be thankful.
...I think I'm different from other people.
When someone good-looking likes me, or a friend's dream comes true...
Other people would cry in happiness, but I don't feel happy at all.
Normal happiness doesn't fulfill me. I was always left behind by myself.
The first time I caught somebody...and shrunk them...
When I accidentally crushed their struggling little hands and feet with my fingers--
Something sparked deep within my heart. This is it. I knew the moment I did it.
From then on, color returned to my life. It was just so fun playing with little people.
But, as time passed... I've eaten people on a whim--even friends I'd finally made somehow...
And I started to waver. I wondered if I couldn't fall in love with someone, like everyone around me.
You've been a good supervisor since the day I met you, Rin.
But things happened, and you fell in love with me.
It made me uncomfortable, so I erased your memory.
It's cuter if you hate and despise me, don't you think?
I made you do lots of awful things after erasing your memory.
So that you'd hate me and die like a normal little person.
You came back to me again.
Hey, Rin. Let's go home together.
No matter what happens, I won't waver anymore.
I'll protect this happiness to the end.
